name: Syrian Meat Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients (except the biscuits) together in a large bowl.
2. Let the mixture marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Open the biscuit package and let them reach room temperature.
4. Coat a baking sheet with oil.
5. Press the biscuits into 6-inch pies, using more oil to coat your fingers for easy handling.
6. Fill each pie with the meat mixture and slightly lift the edges.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes, or until browned.
8. These pies are great to make ahead of time and freeze well. They can be nuked for a lunchtime snack.
